positive: A minimalist, stylish depiction of a cosmic mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant, nebula-filled twilight sky. The mountains are sharply defined, stylized in thick, geometric lines, forming an abstract, majestic backdrop. Below the mountains, a crescent moon and several stylized constellations (like the Big Dipper) are visible. The color palette should be deep indigo, electric violet, shimmering teal, and subtle gold accents, giving an ethereal, celestial glow. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed as a continuous print motif suitable for apparel. Highly detailed, high contrast, vector-art aesthetic with a gradient nebula background. Minimalist graphic design, flat lay look, sticker style, clean vector illustration.
negative: blurry, noisy, grain, artifacts, low-res, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, letters, signature, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, malformed, disfigured, asymmetrical, photorealism, gradients (unless nebula background), oil painting, sketch, grainy
